chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constt: Petition No.D-1263 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 06-5-2025 Mr. Ajay Kumar, Advocate for the petitioner Syed Naveed Ahmed Shah, DAG -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, does not press the instant petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E J U D G E Naveed Ali
